name: Dragunity Lord - Georgius
name_jp: ドラグニティロード－ゲオルギアス
desc:
2+ monsters, including a Tuner
Your opponent cannot activate the effects of monsters in the GY while this card is equipped with a "Dragunity" card. You can only use each of the following effects of "Dragunity Lord - Georgius" once per turn. If this card is Link Summoned, or your opponent Special Summons a monster(s): You can Special Summon 1 Level 5 or higher "Dragunity" monster from your Extra Deck or GY. When your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card or effect (Quick Effect): You can send 1 Equip Card you control to the GY; negate that effect.
mnst_eff:
2+ monsters, including a Tuner

You can only use each of the following effects of "Dragunity Lord - Georgius" once per turn. When your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card or effect (Quick Effect): You can send 1 Equip Card you control to the GY; negate that effect.
eff:
2+ monsters, including a Tuner
Your opponent cannot activate the effects of monsters in the GY while this card is equipped with a "Dragunity" card. You can only use each of the following effects of "Dragunity Lord - Georgius" once per turn. If this card is Link Summoned, or your opponent Special Summons a monster(s): You can Special Summon 1 Level 5 or higher "Dragunity" monster from your Extra Deck or GY. When your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card or effect (Quick Effect): You can send 1 Equip Card you control to the GY; negate that effect.

action: Applies effect while equipped with an Equip Card
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Requires Tuner monsters as Link Materials
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
